# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AWS CloudFormation Template for application stack

Resources:

  MyVPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'

  MySubnet:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'

  MySecurityGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup'
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'SecurityGroup for application stack'
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC

  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Instance'
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: ami-0abcdef1234567890
      SubnetId: !Ref MySubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref MySecurityGroup

  MyRDSInstance:
    Type: 'AWS::RDS::DBInstance'
    Properties:
      Engine: mysql
      MasterUsername: root
      MasterUserPassword: rootpassword
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      AllocatedStorage: '5'
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref MySecurityGroup

  MyBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: my-application-bucket

  MyLoadBalancer:
    Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancing::LoadBalancer'
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerName: my-load-balancer
      Subnets:
        - !Ref MySubnet
      Listeners:
        - LoadBalancerPort: '80'
          InstancePort: '80'
          Protocol: HTTP

Outputs:
  VPC:
    Value: !Ref MyVPC
  Subnet:
    Value: !Ref MySubnet
  SecurityGroup:
    Value: !Ref MySecurityGroup
  EC2Instance:
    Value: !Ref MyEC2Instance
  RDSInstance:
    Value: !Ref MyRDSInstance
  S3Bucket:
    Value: !Ref MyBucket
  LoadBalancer:
    Value: !Ref MyLoadBalancer
---
